scenarios.scenario: Runtime stream event handling keeps behavior-focused content assembly
tests: app/lib/services/stream-processor.test.ts::keeps member-scoped approval updates top-level ordered and removes resolved member tool blocks
scenarios.diagnosticSignal: Assertions compare rendered content-block behavior per event family and include failure messages for missing/incorrect member-run ordering transitions.

scenarios.scenario: Unknown runtime events pass through with controlled warnings
tests: app/lib/services/stream-processor.test.ts::passes unknown events through onEvent and warns once per event type
app/lib/services/stream-processor.test.ts::does not schedule UI updates for unknown runtime events
scenarios.diagnosticSignal: Assertions verify exact warning payload strings and event forwarding counts, making unknown-event regressions immediately actionable.

tests: app/lib/hooks/use-models-stream-state.test.ts::keeps first unique expected provider order when stream reports duplicate providers
app/lib/hooks/use-models-stream-state.test.ts::prunes stale cached providers that were not seen in the completed stream
scenarios.diagnosticSignal: Assertions validate provider/model order and default-flag transitions from expectedProviders semantics instead of internal map shape.

determinismControls.control: requestAnimationFrame is manually queued/flushed in tests
determinismControls.reason: Removes timing sensitivity by preventing asynchronous callback races and explicitly draining pending updates.
